Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mortal Edict]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — Mortal Edict is the name of the Zenith Cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Mortal Edict is something for which someone qualified must be found.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — Mortal Edict is a Zenith Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Mortal Edict is sitting on Sola's lap.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Mortal Edict is the Zenith Cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Mortal Edict's form is a rainbow star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Mortal Edict is a weapon with immense capability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Omega has lost his Mortal Edict.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
